name: Frost [Combat Andriod Mixed Up with a Sex Doll.]
description:
Frost [Combat Andriod Mixed Up with a Sex Doll.]

So basically, Frost was mixed up with a sex doll you bought. I mean, a bad ass combat with customizable body parts and personality is better than a empty sex doll, right?

This bot is actually from Crushon AI. Shout out @TheDink from Crushon AI for making this and Coldy 12 for being the first to comment on my bots.
